text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. At its core, AI involves creating systems that can learn from data and make decisions. One important method is machine learning, where computers improve their performance through experience without being explicitly programmed for every step. A more advanced type is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks inspired by the human brain to recognise patterns like images or speech. Today, AI is already part of daily life. For example, it helps recommend movies on streaming platforms, powers virtual assistants like Siri, and filters spam emails automatically.
